methods.name: Stage-Progression
methods.rationale: Applies typical Series C → next-stage step-up multiplier (1.7x) to $140M total raised proxy.

methods.name: Peer-Median
methods.skip_reason: insufficient narrow peer set in Nuclear Energy (found 0 same-stage, 2 adjacent-stage, 0 similar-tier; need ≥3)
methods.rationale: 8 same-sector peers exist in Nuclear Energy, but none of the narrow filters (same-stage / adjacent-stage / similar-valuation-tier) yielded ≥3 datapoints. Falling back to all-sector median would be misleading.

public.rationale: Public-co frontier-tech comp in Nuclear Energy
Public-co frontier-tech comp in Nuclear Energy
Public-co frontier-tech comp in Nuclear Energy

data.narrative:
Last Energy, founded by Bret Kugelmass, is a Series C-stage nuclear energy company that has raised $140M+ to date. The nuclear energy sector includes 3 public comparables (OKLO, NNE, SMR) and 8 private peers, including Oklo, TerraPower, X-Energy, Kairos Power, and Nano Nuclear Energy.

A peer-median approach was not applicable due to insufficient same-stage and adjacent-stage comparables in the nuclear energy space. The company's narrow peer set lacks the three or more datapoints required for robust cross-sectional valuation. The stage-progression method was therefore applied, using the $140M total raised as a proxy baseline and applying a 1.7x step-up multiplier typical of Series C to next-stage transitions, yielding an implied valuation of $238M.

The analysis supports a valuation range of $202M (low) to $274M (high), with a median of $238M. This range reflects the single applicable method and assumes the 1.7x multiplier reasonably captures Last Energy's stage-appropriate progression. Key uncertainties include the absence of direct peer comparables at the same stage and valuation tier, making it difficult to validate whether the stage-progression multiple accurately reflects market conditions in the frontier nuclear subsector. Additional data on recent Series C rounds in advanced nuclear would strengthen conviction in this range.
